profile.belief: Spaces that fight back force sharper solutions. If they don't push, neither do you.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to challenge perceptions, believing that the environment itself can inspire deeper engagement and transformation.
